top_constraints.description: Out= Nil, avoid voltage collapse for loss of Horsham - Murra Warra - Kiamal 220kV line. Murraylink VFRB disabled. Swamp if Murraylink VFRB enabled.
Out = Nil, avoid voltage collapse around Murray for loss of all APD potlines
Out = Marulan to Yass (4 or 5) 330kV line, avoid voltage collapse around Murray for loss of all APD potlines
Out= Nil, limit power flow on line X5 from Balranald to Darlington Point (X5) to avoid voltage collapse at Balranald for contingency trip of Bendigo to Shepparton 220kV line in NW Victoria
Out= Nil, avoid O/L Elaine to Moorabool 220kV line on trip of Ballarat to Moorabool No.2 220kV line, Feedback
Out= Murraylink, avoid voltage collapse for loss of Horsham - Murra Warra - Kiamal 220kV line

Out= Nil, limit power flow on line X5 from Balranald to Darlington Point (X5) to avoid voltage collapse at Balranald for contingency trip of Bendigo to Kerang 220kV line and other nearby lines in NW V
Out= Nil, avoid O/L Waubra to Ballarat 220kV line on trip of Kerang to Bendigo 220kV line, Feedback
Out = NIL, prevent transient instability for fault and trip of a HWTS-SMTS 500 kV line, Other than VIC accelerates. Yallourn W G1 on 500kV.
Out = NIL, prevent transient instability for fault and trip of a HWTS-SMTS 500 kV line, VIC accelerates. Yallourn W G1 on 500kV.
Out = NIL, prevent transient instability for fault and trip of a HWTS-SMTS 500 kV line, Other than VIC accelerates. Yallourn W G1 on 220kV.

Out = NSW Murraylink runback scheme, VIC to SA transfer limit on Murraylink to avoid voltage collapse at Red Cliffs for the loss of either the Darlington Point to Balranald (X5) or Balranald to Burong
Out = One South Morang 330 kV series capacitor bank, prevent transient instability for fault and trip of a HWTS-SMTS 500 kV line, Other than VIC accelerates. Yallourn W G1 on 220kV.
Out = NIL, prevent transient instability for fault and trip of a HWTS-SMTS 500 kV line, VIC accelerates. Yallourn W G1 on 220kV.
Out = Lower to Maragle (64) or Margle to Upper Tumut (6M) 330kV line, avoid voltage collapse around Murray for loss of all APD potlines
